description: Baseline visual + interaction mismatch report for shell + high-impact pages

3.2_customers.root_cause: Audit selector mismatch: audit checks for '.customer-detail-page, .customer-detail-drawer, #cdetail-panels' but page uses '.cdetail-page'. Detail page renders correctly.

severity_high.original: Họ và tên, Ngày sinh, Ngày hẹn gần nhất, Ngày hẹn sắp tới, Ngày điều trị gần nhất, Tình trạng điều trị
severity_high.replica: STT, THÔNG TIN KHÁCH HÀNG, NGÀY SINH, SỐ ĐIỆN THOẠI, EMAIL, NGÀY TẠO, THAO TÁC
severity_high.impact: Different column set — user sees different data fields

severity_high.original: Sorted by most recent (Ngày hẹn gần nhất descending), customer codes like T160333 +43
severity_high.replica: Sorted alphabetically Z-A, customer codes like (T3306)
severity_high.impact: Different default sort order and code format

severity_medium.impact: Different user identity display (data-dependent, not a bug)

severity_medium.original: Outlined pill with location pin, specific branch pre-selected (Nha khoa Tấm Dentist)
severity_medium.replica: Outlined pill with location pin, 'Tất cả chi nhánh' as default

severity_medium.original: No stat cards at top, goes directly to TIẾP NHẬN KHÁCH HÀNG
severity_medium.replica: Has 4 stat cards (Khách hàng, Lịch hẹn, Doanh thu, Công việc) above main content
severity_medium.impact: Extra UI element not in original

severity_medium.original: Khách hàng | Đang điều trị | Hoàn thành | Chưa phát sinh (no counts in tabs)
severity_medium.replica: Tất cả 200 | Đang điều trị 0 | Hoàn thành 0 | Chưa phát sinh 200 (counts in tabs)
severity_medium.impact: Different tab naming and count display style

severity_low.original: Icons have slightly different arrangement order after Kho
severity_low.replica: Icons match general structure but some sub-items differ

severity_low.original: Single colored circle with first initial + icon indicator
severity_low.replica: Colored circle with two-letter initials + gender icon

severity_high.detail: Audit expects '.customer-detail-page, .customer-detail-drawer, #cdetail-panels' but page uses '.cdetail-page'. Page actually works — audit needs fixing.

topbar.overall_structure: MATCH — hamburger, search, reception button, timer, branch selector, notifications, user, logout
differences: Branch selector defaults to 'Tất cả chi nhánh' vs specific branch in original

sidebar.overall_structure: MATCH — dark sidebar with icon navigation, collapsed by default
differences: Help button at bottom present in both

next_steps: U0.2: Prioritize these defects by severity
Fix audit_phase3_4.py selector for customer detail page to unblock 3.2
Address customers table column parity (high severity)
Address customers sort order and tab labels
